chapter_title.en: The Merits of the Ziyārah of the Believers and How it Should be Performed

parts.text: عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبَانٍ

text: قَامَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ (ع) عَلَى قَبْرِ رَجُلٍ فَقَالَ اللَّهُمَّ صِلْ وَحْدَتَهُ وَ آنِسْ وَحْشَتَهُ وَ أَسْكِنْ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ مَا يَسْتَغْنِي بِهِ عَنْ رَحْمَةِ مَنْ سِوَاكَ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 14. My father narrated to me from Ḥusain ibn Ḥasan ibn Abān, from Muḥammad ibn Ūramah, from ‘Ali ibn Ḥakam, from Ibn ‘Ajlān, who said: Abū Ja’far (Imam Bāqir (a.s.)) stood next to the grave of a man and said: O Allāh! Connect with him in his loneliness; keep him company in his desolation; and descend Your Mercy on him in a way that he will not need the mercy of others.
